clauses.obligation: License to operate single PF business at specific location
clauses.restrictions: No sublicensing of marks; specific location only

clauses.obligation: Franchisor retains all rights to marks, system, PF businesses worldwide
clauses.restrictions: 6 enumerated reserved rights including competing locations, digital channels, brand acquisitions

clauses.obligation: Lease/purchase location within 6 months of signing FA; begin construction within 120 days of lease; complete within 120 days of start; open within 360 days (480 for ground-up)
clauses.trigger: Failure to meet any timeline = termination right + retain all fees

clauses.obligation: Must sublease up to 10% of total sqft at fair market value upon franchisor request

obligations.amount: 20% of regular monthly fee or 5% of prepaid

clauses.obligation: Must authorize EFT withdrawals from designated account for all fees, royalties, and third-party payments
Must complete initial training to franchisor satisfaction; failure = termination right
clauses.trigger: Non-completion within 90 days of FA signing

restrictions: Must cease all use upon termination
Full debranding required including trade dress

clauses.obligation: Keep all proprietary info confidential during and after term
restrictions: May not disclose to AI/ML platforms

obligations.scope: Must comply with all standards in Operations Manual
Must maintain premises to brand standards; franchisor can enter and maintain at your expense
Only approved products; must participate in all national campaigns/promotions
Must comply with max price and min advertised price policies
Full reciprocal membership to all PF members, possibly without payment
PCI compliance, breach notification, franchisor may terminate for data breach
Must use designated POS; no unapproved equipment; no contractual limits on upgrade costs

obligations.amount: Up to 7% Monthly EFT for single month

obligations.obligation: Must participate; may require fee waivers or reduced pricing

clauses.obligation: Must maintain complete records; periodic reports as required; franchisor may verify/audit
Franchisor may inspect business at any time without notice; must cooperate; franchisor may audit financial records
clauses.money: Must reimburse audit costs if noncompliant

obligations.scope: Franchisor may match bona fide offer; 30-day exercise period; may assign ROFR rights
Transferee must meet qualifications, complete training, sign then-current FA
Compliance, cure deficiencies, remodel, pay $20K, sign then-current SA (materially different terms possible), maintain premises, training, release, current on obligations

obligations.quote: the terms of which may differ materially from the terms of this Agreement, including a higher Royalty rate, different Royalty calculation, additional fees

clauses.obligation: If expired without renewal, franchisor may permit continued operation; royalty may increase up to 4%
clauses.trigger: 30 days written notice by either party to end

rights.trigger: Franchisor material breach uncured 60 days after notice
Lowest 5% EFT for 12 consecutive months + unprofitable + open 3+ years
rights.note: Waives franchisor right to future lost royalties but does not waive ADA obligations

triggers.default: Fail to maintain designated account or pay amounts due
Fail to pay third-party obligations (lender, supplier, landlord)
Fail to lease/purchase location per Art 4.2
Fail to provide weekly construction reports

defaults.note: Extensive list including failure to maintain standards, failure to comply with operations manual, unauthorized use of marks, failure to maintain insurance, data security breach, etc.

obligations.item: Cease all use of marks within 30 days
Full debranding including trade dress, flooring colors, wall colors, equipment piping colors
Transfer phone numbers, domain names, accounts
Non-compete: 2 years at location + 15 miles of location + 15 miles of any PF business
ROFR non-compete: 5 years within 15 miles of any PF business sold to franchisor

clauses.obligation: Franchisee indemnifies franchisor for claims arising from operations, breaches, ownership disputes, unauthorized mark use, confidentiality violations, securities offerings, unapproved marketing, debranding, IP infringement, defamation

clauses.scope: Excuses performance for acts of God, strikes, utility outages, government orders, etc.; but does not excuse financial obligations or post-term obligations

clauses.mechanism: Mediation first (mandatory); then binding arbitration (AAA rules); venue: Portsmouth, NH (or then-current HQ city)
clauses.exceptions: Either party may seek injunctive relief from any court

clauses.scope: Waive right to claim punitive, exemplary, or multiple damages; waive jury trial; waive right to participate in class actions
FA supersedes all prior agreements and representations (subject to state law)
Must be in writing; but franchisor can modify by 70% franchised vote; NAF/LAF changes by 66%/51% vote; remodel/re-equip acceleration by 66%/51% vote

distinctive_clauses.note: Franchisor can require franchisee to sublease 10% of location at fair market value — unusual provision
May not disclose proprietary information to AI or ML platforms without authorization
May be required to give full reciprocity to all PF members including unlimited access potentially without payment
Max price and minimum advertised price policies — franchisor controls pricing
Franchisee-favorable: can exit on 12 months notice if in lowest 5% for 12 months and unprofitable
70% franchised vote can amend FA; 66%/51% vote can change fee caps and remodel timelines
Up to 4% additional royalty during extended cure period — penalty for slow cure
